steps.title: Identify the revealing detail
steps.content: When Tom surveys the fence, his mood instantly shifts from gladness to deep melancholy. The next sentence reveals the fence is 30 yards long and 9 feet high—an enormous task. The word must mean examining or visually assessing something to understand its scope.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Looked at” is the only choice that explains Tom's sudden melancholy—he sees the fence's massive size and realizes the scope of his task.

The other choices either focus on doubt, contradict his emotional response, or are unrelated to the context.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
